response.justification: Exceptionally experienced full-stack engineer with 17+ years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems. Currently building AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, directly addressing a key job requirement. Demonstrates deep TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platform expertise (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker). Primary gaps are lack of explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, but strong pattern of framework mastery and TDD foundation suggest quick proficiency.
strengths: 17+ years of full-stack experience across multiple paradigms with proven ability to master diverse technologies and domains
Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, and containerization; currently architecting AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Staff-level background with demonstrated leadership, software craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD), and mentoring experience
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest—listed in primary stack—not explicitly mentioned on resume despite TypeScript/Node.js background
Testing framework expertise (Jest, Playwright) not documented; only TDD philosophy and testing libraries shown, not framework specifics
Recent history shows frequent job transitions and only ~13 months in current role, making assessment of latest technical depth limited

key_factors.factor: Extensive full-stack and systems architecture background
